textByHash.94ef1f596a31b503c631ab0a2e96f53f855d2132: We could always do with an extra pair of hands on the dock. See Frankie, the fresh fish trader, if you're looking for work.
textByHash.04df8b9a8b8833beafb765206a761eaa246ce22d: We can fix this faster if we work together!
textByHash.ebf7eb9f4e4d02c7730986d688d1ad2cc6cbb8e1: Can I get some assistance over here?
textByHash.30a2482efba6e77272828a4ebfe3d3104fa79bcc: Great work, this crane should be good for a while!
